bear.t: No Durable Revenue Base; Large Losses
bear.b: Minimal revenue combined with deep, recurring losses means the company lacks self-sustaining cash generation. bear.t: Expanded Equity Plan Increases Dilution Risk
bear.b: Broadening the equity incentive pool and removing pre-set caps raises the probability of meaningful future share issuance for compensation or financing.
